entity.summary: Cronos automated-market-maker decentralized exchange for ERC-20 token swaps, liquidity pools, and staking-backed DeFi activity.
entity.notes: Current first-party CronaSwap application redirects to the live swap route. DefiLlama independently identifies CronaSwap as a Cronos AMM DEX and reports current TVL and staked value. Confidence is medium because detailed first-party protocol documentation and current volume metrics were not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: CronaSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint redirects into the live `/en/swap` exchange route and remains reachable.

evidence.title: CronaSwap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies CronaSwap as a Cronos AMM DEX for swapping ERC-20 tokens and reports current TVL and staked value.

evidence.title: CronaSwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently preserves CronaSwap as a Cronos decentralized exchange; current first-party application access remains the primary active-status signal.
